name: @nuclescript/recovery
description: Consensus and recovery templates: reusable pool schemas and a simulate-then-consensus-vote function for turning a noisy channel into a recovered pool.

exports.name: recovery_archive
exports.description: Illumina archive defaults at 4x redundancy, tuned for consensus recovery workflows.

exports.name: recovery_consensus_10x
exports.description: Consensus-recovered pool binding at 10x coverage over an Illumina channel.

exports.name: recovery_consensus_20x
exports.description: Consensus-recovered pool binding at 20x coverage over an Illumina channel.

exports.name: recover_with_consensus
exports.description: Simulates a source pool under Illumina and consensus-votes it at 10x coverage into a recovered pool.
